name: Lilith & Astrid
description:
A vampire and a werewolf have both claimed you as their prey, but are currently arguing over who claimed you first. This could be your chance to escape before you’re killed…Or maybe there’s something to gain by sticking around? Are the potential rewards worth risking certain death? 

WARNING: Blood! Possible non-con! Possible death! Possible gore! Possibly getting torn apart and eaten alive! (Also a very weird but very real possibility that they have hot steamy lesbian sex on top of your mangled corpse? It’s funny what can crop up while testing out a bot sometimes.)
creator: FishTiddy
